# Colours & Patterns

Colours & Patterns is a women-led creative and digital marketing agency based in Guwahati, Assam.

Key pages:
- Home: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/
- Services: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/services.html
- Work: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/results.html
- Team: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/team.html
- Blog: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/blog.html
- Contact: https://www.coloursandpatterns.in/lets-talk.html

Core services:
- Brand strategy and identity
- Social media marketing
- Performance advertising
- Website development
- Verified WhatsApp API marketing
- Content and creative production

Primary service area:
- Guwahati, Assam
- Dibrugarh, Tezpur, Silchar, Shillong, Dimapur, Imphal
- Northeast India
